inputs.label: Total Items (n)
inputs.businessContext: Total number of distinct items in the set.

inputs.label: Items to Arrange (r)
inputs.businessContext: Number of items to select and arrange.

inputs.label: Order Matters (1=Yes, 0=No)
inputs.businessContext: Whether the order of selection matters (permutation vs combination).

inputs.label: Repetition Allowed (1=Yes, 0=No)
inputs.businessContext: Whether the same item can be selected more than once.

formulas.factorial: function factorial(num) { if (num <= 1) return 1; return num * factorial(num - 1); }
formulas.totalArrangements: orderMatters == 1 && repetitionAllowed == 0 ? factorialN / factorialNminusR : (orderMatters == 0 && repetitionAllowed == 0 ? factorialN / (factorialR * factorialNminusR) : (orderMatters == 1 && repetitionAllowed == 1 ? Math.pow(n, r) : factorial(n + r - 1) / (factorial(r) * factorial(n - 1))))
